description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs gnss-sdr in non-x86 architectures. Trigger on push to branches matching **-archs and main, and allow manual dispatch. Use a ubuntu-latest job matrix to test across multiple architectures, distributions, and compilers. For each matrix entry, check out the code, run on a container matching the target architecture, install dependencies, build gnss-sdr with CMake, and execute a test.
